ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the mission was launched */,
  "launch_vehicle" TEXT /* Name of the launch vehicle used */,
  "mission_patch_link" TEXT /* Link to the mission patch */,
  "article_link" TEXT /* Link to the mission article */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the mission video */,
  "reddit_launch" TEXT /* Link to the Reddit launch discussion */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the mission */,
  "launch_success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the mission was successful */,
  "mission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission type */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch site */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spacecraft */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, aborted) */,
  "mission_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mission in days */,
  "mission_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the mission */,
  "mission_version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "mission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type_id") REFERENCES mission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_vehicle FOREIGN KEY ("launch_vehicle") REFERENCES launch_vehicles ("vehicle_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the launch vehicle (e.g., liquid-fueled, solid-fueled) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the launch vehicle */,
  "vehicle_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the vehicle (e.g., thrust, payload capacity) */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, retired, under maintenance) */,
  "vehicle_launch_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the vehicle has been launched */,
  "vehicle_first_launch" TEXT /* Date of the first launch of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_last_launch" TEXT /* Date of the last launch of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission type */,
  "type_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the mission type */,
  "type_color" TEXT /* Color code for the mission type to use in visualizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbital_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbital parameter */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the parameter belongs to */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the orbit */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the orbit */,
  "periapsis" REAL /* Periapsis of the orbit */,
  "apoapsis" REAL /* Apoapsis of the orbit */,
  "parameter_version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "parameter_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the orbital parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "site_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the launch site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the launch site in meters */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, closed, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions_launch_sites" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the spacecraft (e.g., satellite, lander, rover) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the spacecraft (e.g., mass, dimensions) */,
  "spacecraft_status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft (e.g., active, retired, under maintenance) */,
  "spacecraft_launch_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the spacecraft has been launched */,
  "spacecraft_first_launch" TEXT /* Date of the first launch of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_last_launch" TEXT /* Date of the last launch of the spacecraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft_missions" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spacecraft */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id", "mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mission controller, analyst, administrator) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mission data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the article belongs to */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_link" TEXT /* Link to the article */,
  "article_author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "article_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., website, magazine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_articles_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the video belongs to */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in minutes */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "video_author" TEXT /* Author or uploader of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_videos_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the patch belongs to */,
  "patch_link" TEXT /* Link to the mission patch */,
  "patch_author" TEXT /* Designer or creator of the patch */,
  "patch_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the patch was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_patches_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)
